name: paper-questions
description: An AI-powered academic paper question generator that extracts text from PDF files and generates 3 thought-provoking questions exploring technical details, applications, comparisons, and future directions.
description_zh: 学术智能论文问题助手，从PDF文件中提取文本，并生成3个探索技术细节、应用场景、方法对比及未来方向的深度思考问题。
